verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's been awhile of sunny days Waiting for a rain to ease my pain Rain brings blessing to feed my soul And I believed in my heart and I know Yes I know, yes I know

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I look up in the sky and seems getting dark Clouds are now above my head Feel the coolness starts But the clouds just pass by The sun returns as time goes by My hope is gone, my hope is gone

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Like a cloud and wind without rain Is a man who boasts on His name Received the gift but has no power to give Midnight cloud in the southern sky Full of pride to shower the night As dawn comes down, Rain is gone, rain is gone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I long for this treasure that I missed Salvation of my soul is gone like a mist Are you feeling alright for the gift that you keep? Or you're a man of cloud A man of cloud
